(O Prophet), Did We not lay open your breastFootnote-1
and relieve you of the burden
that had well-nigh broken your back?Footnote-2
And did We not exalt your fame?Footnote-3
Indeed, there is ease with hardship.
Most certainly, there is ease with hardship.Footnote-4
So, whenever you are free, strive in devotion,
and turn to your Lord with longing.Footnote-5
